description:
Identify the non-internal edge (ID not starting with ':') with the highest truck volume (vType="truck_type") based on entered vehicle counts in the Bologna Acosta baseline scenario (~/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_acosta/baseline.sumocfg). Modify the network to ban trucks on that edge and save it as ~/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_acosta/acosta_hgv_ban.net.xml. Create and execute a new simulation configuration ~/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_acosta/ban.sumocfg that uses the modified network, enables dynamic rerouting for trucks, and outputs trip information to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/ban_tripinfo.xml. Calculate the average trip duration in seconds for completed truck trips in both the baseline and ban scenarios. Write the results to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/hgv_report.txt in the following format:

banned_edge: <edge_id>
baseline_truck_avg_duration: <value>
ban_truck_avg_duration: <value>
